src: A curve fitting program for small-angle scattering curves, mostly from SAXS and SANS experiments in analytical or biological chemistry. 📄https://doi.org/10.1107/S1600576722009037 📄https://doi.org/10.1107/S1600576717011979 📄https://doi.org/10.1107/S1600576715016544
ja: 分析化学または生物化学のSAXSおよびSANS実験を中心とした小角散乱曲線向けカーブフィッティングプログラム。📄https://doi.org/10.1107/S1600576722009037 📄https://doi.org/10.1107/S1600576717011979 📄https://doi.org/10.1107/S1600576715016544
